g.text: ~ every model fights every model. the jury sees both sides. ~
8 candidates · full round-robin: 28 matches × 5 rounds · 3-judge jury · log → battles.jsonl
each match samples 5 of 30 (seeded slice) — pass --rounds 30 for all
worst case: every response maxed out at its token cap; typical runs cost noticeably less. Exact spend is reported after the run.
⚖ judge/candidate family overlap: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, google/gemini-2.5-flash-lite, openai/gpt-5.4-nano — the
report will carry this caveat; prefer out-of-family judges to defend the numbers
What happens next: every pair streams side by side; the jury votes in both seat orders (a flip = abstain); standings refit after
[ ENTER fight (spends up to $11.87) ] [ Q quit ]
